prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle mass with caloric surplus for strength training

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 3+ meals distributed throughout the day
Total daily protein intake is at least 1.7g per kg of body weight (≥145g)
Plan creates a caloric surplus appropriate for muscle building (2,800-3,200 calories estimated)
All meals are specific and realistic for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein intake and caloric surplus for muscle building

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training day with carbohydrate loading and optimal hydration for endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout
Includes high carbohydrate intake (6-10g per kg body weight) appropriate for endurance athlete
Specifies hydration strategy with fluid and electrolyte recommendations
Provides approximate calorie and macronutrient breakdown for each meal
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring specific carbohydrate loading and hydration strategies

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain 71 kg weight class for boxing competition in 3 days while optimizing performance and muscle preservation
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy due to lactose intolerance

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 71 kg athlete's maintenance calories while staying within weight class limit
Includes high protein intake (minimum 1.6g per kg body weight) to preserve muscle during weight management
All meals are dairy-free and practical for a single day
Provides balanced macronutrients suitable for boxing training performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport with strict weight management requirements (boxer or wrestler) balancing nutrition while meeting weight class constraints
